specs.section_path: 15-Layer Summary Table > 3.2 The Dynamic Spine: The Unified Phase Dynamics Equation (UPDE) > The Unified Phase Dynamics Equation (UPDE) > Components of the UPDE: > Intrinsic Dynamics (ωiL​):
source_formulae: P0R02629: Represents hierarchical nesting and timescale separation (Bidirectional Causality).
P0R02630: $CInterLayer = \epsilon L - 1 FD\left( \left\langle \theta L - 1 \right\rangle,\theta iL \right) + \epsilon L + 1 GU\left( \theta iL,\left\langle \theta L + 1 \right\rangle \right)$

P0R02631: Where are scale separation parameters. FD (Downward coupling) often involves mechanisms like Phase-Amplitude Coupling (PAC), where the phase of the higher layer modulates the dynamics of the lower layer. GU (Upward coupling) involves the aggregation of lower-layer coherence.
